description: Host and network discovery (ping, nslookup, curl, scan-like activity) to validate NDR, firewall, DNS, and ICMP telemetry.
expected_telemetry: Internal scan / ARP / flow logs (per sensor and NDR policy)
safety_notes: Discovery-style activity can add load to the internal network. Check maintenance windows and mirror/capture capacity.
cleanup_notes: After `scenario stop`, revert the pre-run snapshot if needed. Sandcat and ability residue may still require guest-level checks.
